urlUpdates.name: Kaya Services
urlUpdates.evidence: Old kayaservices.com is parked; company now at kaya.services — Australian-Filipino VA firm with offshore VAs in Manila
urlUpdates.note: Domain moved to kaya.services; hires Filipino VAs in Manila.

urlUpdates.name: Olivia Pros
urlUpdates.evidence: OLIVIA Professional Solutions places Filipino VAs with US home-care agencies; /careers on .com 404s but active careers page now on .ph
urlUpdates.note: Homepage alive; careers moved to oliviapros.ph. Clearly hires PH VAs (home care, dental, real estate, medical). Update the dead /careers URL.

urlUpdates.name: REassist
urlUpdates.evidence: reassist.com.au serves a mismatched crazydomains cert; current site is reassist.net.au, which states it connects Filipino professionals with AU/NZ real estate businesses
urlUpdates.note: Domain moved from .com.au to .net.au; PH-focused real estate VA provider since ~2015

urlUpdates.name: Support Shepherd
urlUpdates.evidence: Support Shepherd officially rebranded to Somewhere.com in May 2024; recruiters in the Philippines and LatAm place overseas talent incl. Filipino assistants
urlUpdates.note: Rebranded to Somewhere (somewhere.com); still actively recruits Filipino talent — update name and URL

urlUpdates.name: Surge Virtual Assistants
urlUpdates.evidence: Surge is a major PH VA training/placement agency; listed domain refused connections on fetch while main brand lives at surgefreelancingmarketplace.com with a Surge VA application portal
urlUpdates.note: Company alive and PH-focused; primary domain is now surgefreelancingmarketplace.com — update link. Note it is part training marketplace, part VA placement.

urlUpdates.name: SellerPrism
urlUpdates.evidence: Old .com domain dead; company now live at sellerprism.agency — e-commerce recruitment agency with remote-first team across multiple countries and active careers pages.
urlUpdates.note: Domain moved from sellerprism.com to sellerprism.agency; remote e-comm specialist recruiter, PH inclusion likely but not explicitly confirmed.

urlUpdates.name: Surge Digital Agency
urlUpdates.evidence: Root domain DNS dead but company rebranded as Surge Freelancing Marketplace (Davao City); academy.surgedigital.agency subdomain still active; described as the Philippines' biggest VA agency since 2016.
urlUpdates.note: Rebranded/moved to surgefreelancingmarketplace.com; PH VA agency + training academy/marketplace.

urlUpdates.name: TELUS International
urlUpdates.evidence: Rebranded to TELUS Digital in 2024; telusinternational.com redirects to telusdigital.com; major PH BPO employer
urlUpdates.note: Company rebranded to TELUS Digital — update name and URL

urlUpdates.name: Unity Communications
urlUpdates.evidence: Web search confirms company operates at unity-connect.com; PH headquarters in Paranaque/Cavite with 300+ staff
urlUpdates.note: Domain moved from unity-communications.com to unity-connect.com; company active and PH-based

urlUpdates.name: ThinkRemote.org
urlUpdates.evidence: The established ThinkRemote remote-work news site and job board operates at thinkremote.com; the .org listing refused connection on fetch and is not the canonical platform
urlUpdates.note: Point URL to thinkremote.com and relabel as remote-work news/job board, not an employer

urlUpdates.name: Remote Talent Australia
urlUpdates.evidence: Old domain DNS-dead; search found 'Remote Talent' at remotetalent.com.au, an Australian firm connecting AU businesses with Filipino virtual assistants and managing their wages/compliance — same name and identical niche
urlUpdates.note: Almost certainly the same business on a .com.au domain; homepage confirms PH VA staffing for Australian clients. Worth a quick human glance to confirm identity.

urlUpdates.name: Cool Blue VA
urlUpdates.evidence: Careers site states 'Must be a Philippine citizen only' and recruits medical professionals based in the Philippines
urlUpdates.note: Careers path redirects to careers.coolblueva.com; explicitly PH-only hiring for medical VAs. Update link to the redirect target.

recategorizations.name: Upwork
recategorizations.evidence: Globally known freelance marketplace, not an employer; Filipinos are hired via it but Upwork itself does not employ them
recategorizations.note: Keep in directory but relabel as a freelance marketplace, not a hiring company.

recategorizations.name: Filipino Virtual Assistants (FVA)
recategorizations.evidence: fvacademy.com is a Filipino VA training academy/community that connects members to clients, not a direct employer
recategorizations.note: PH-focused VA training academy and community, not an employer; relabel from hiring company to training/community platform.

recategorizations.name: The Freelance Movement
recategorizations.evidence: thefreelancemovement.com is a training/community for Filipino freelancers, not a direct employer
recategorizations.note: PH freelancer training community, not a hiring company; relabel.

recategorizations.name: VA Bootcamp PH
recategorizations.evidence: vabootcamp.ph is a training academy for Filipino virtual assistants, not an employer
recategorizations.note: PH-focused VA training academy, not a hiring company; relabel.

recategorizations.name: EVirtualAssistants
recategorizations.evidence: Self-describes as the '#1 Virtual Assistants Marketplace in the Philippines' — a direct-hire marketplace (200,000+ VAs) where clients post jobs and hire VAs directly, not an employer; site LIVE
recategorizations.note: PH-focused VA marketplace/platform, not an employer; can stay in directory but relabel as marketplace (also runs an optional recruiting service)

recategorizations.name: OnlineJobs
recategorizations.evidence: OnlineJobs.ph is the largest Filipino job marketplace/board, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Job board/marketplace connecting employers with Filipino workers — not itself an employer. Relabel; may remain in directory as a resource.

recategorizations.name: Outsource Accelerator
recategorizations.evidence: Outsourcing marketplace/directory and media platform connecting businesses with BPOs; not an employer
recategorizations.note: Marketplace/directory/media for the outsourcing industry — does not itself hire Filipinos. Relabel; can stay as a resource.

recategorizations.name: VirtualStaff
recategorizations.evidence: VirtualStaff.ph is a well-known online platform/marketplace connecting employers with Filipino workers ('VirtualStaff Seat System'), not a direct employer.
recategorizations.note: Keep in directory but relabel as marketplace rather than a hiring company.

recategorizations.name: eVirtualAssistants
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known online marketplace where employers post jobs and hire Filipino VAs directly; not an employer itself.
recategorizations.note: Relabel as marketplace/job platform for Filipino VAs, not a hiring company.

recategorizations.name: iWork.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Philippine freelance/job marketplace platform, not a direct employer.
recategorizations.note: Relabel as PH freelance marketplace/job board.

recategorizations.name: OnlineJobs.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known dedicated marketplace for Filipino virtual workers; a platform, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Highly PH-relevant but is a marketplace, not a hiring company; relabel accordingly

recategorizations.name: Remote Jobs Philippines (Instagram)
recategorizations.evidence: Instagram account aggregating remote job posts for Filipinos; a listings channel, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Keep as a PH-focused job-listing resource but relabel; social account, not a company

recategorizations.name: Remotive
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known global remote job board; bot wall on pre-check but site is alive; a platform, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Global job board (some worldwide-remote roles PH-eligible); relabel as job board

recategorizations.name: The Work at Home Woman
recategorizations.evidence: US-focused work-from-home blog and job-listing resource aimed at American women; not an employer and most listed roles are US-only
recategorizations.note: Content/blog job resource with weak PH relevance; relabel as job board, consider whether it merits inclusion at all

recategorizations.name: We Work Remotely
recategorizations.evidence: One of the largest global remote job boards; a platform, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Keep as a resource (many worldwide-remote listings PH-eligible) but relabel as job board

recategorizations.name: Working Nomads
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known remote job aggregator; a platform, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Relabel as job board; aggregates remote listings, does not hire

recategorizations.name: Virtual Assistant Academy (VAA)
recategorizations.evidence: vaa.ph is live; VAA is primarily a Filipino VA training academy with placement, not a conventional employer
recategorizations.note: Training academy for Filipino VAs rather than a hiring company; keep but relabel as training/placement, not an employer.

recategorizations.name: Fiverr
recategorizations.evidence: Globally known freelance gig marketplace; not an employer of Filipino talent
recategorizations.note: Pure marketplace mislabeled under global-va; relabel as marketplace.

recategorizations.name: Galasya
recategorizations.evidence: Homepage fetched: platform where companies post jobs and hire Filipino freelancers directly, 'no middlemen' — a marketplace, not an employer
recategorizations.note: Filipino freelancer marketplace currently under global-va; relabel as marketplace.

recategorizations.name: JobQuest.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Site confirms it is a Philippine virtual job fair platform connecting jobseekers and employers with listings across Metro Manila
recategorizations.note: Live PH job fair/job board platform, not an employer; already in job-boards category — confirm label as job_board, not a hiring company

recategorizations.name: Pesojobs
recategorizations.evidence: Government (PESO/DOLE) job portal for Tacurong City connecting PH job seekers with employers
recategorizations.note: Live LGU/government-run Philippine job portal, not an employer; keep under job_board label

recategorizations.name: Pinoy Jobs Online
recategorizations.evidence: Site is a curated job board listing ~880 remote openings for Filipino workers
recategorizations.note: Live PH-focused remote job board, not an employer; confirm job_board label

recategorizations.name: RemoteTalent.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Pre-check LIVE; fetch dropped connection but domain, name, and existing category strongly indicate a PH remote-jobs board
recategorizations.note: Live PH remote talent job board, not an employer; confirm job_board label (page fetch flaky, verified alive by pre-check)

recategorizations.name: RemoteWork.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Site explicitly states it is 'not a staffing or outsourcing agency' — a direct-hire marketplace where employers hire Filipino remote workers directly
recategorizations.note: Live direct-hire marketplace/job board for Filipino remote workers; not itself an employer

recategorizations.name: Workmates.ph
recategorizations.evidence: Site describes a Metro Manila staffing agency that sources, screens, and places Filipino VAs (300+ placed) with international clients
recategorizations.note: Miscategorized: it is a VA staffing/recruitment agency, not a job board — move from job-boards to VA agency category; keep in directory

recategorizations.name: AngelList / Wellfound
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known global startup job board/platform, not an employer of PH talent
recategorizations.note: Global startup job board; lists remote roles some open to PH but is a platform, not a hiring company

recategorizations.name: Arc.dev
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known remote developer talent marketplace matching global (incl. PH) developers with companies
recategorizations.note: Talent marketplace, not an employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Contra
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known commission-free freelance marketplace open to freelancers worldwide
recategorizations.note: Freelance marketplace, not an employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Dynamite Jobs
recategorizations.evidence: Known remote job board (from the Tropical MBA team) listing worldwide-remote roles
recategorizations.note: Remote job board, not an employer; many listings open to PH applicants

recategorizations.name: FlexJobs
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known subscription remote/flexible job board (ALIVE_CERT = site up)
recategorizations.note: Job board explicitly named in audit rules as non-employer; site alive with a TLS quirk only

recategorizations.name: Freelancer.com
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known global freelance marketplace with a very large Filipino freelancer base; not an employer
recategorizations.note: Freelance marketplace, not a hiring company; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Hubstaff Talent
recategorizations.evidence: Known free remote talent directory/marketplace run by Hubstaff; connects clients with freelancers incl. Filipinos
recategorizations.note: Free talent directory/marketplace, not an employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Indeed Remote
recategorizations.evidence: Indeed is a globally known job aggregator; bot wall only, site is alive
recategorizations.note: Pure job platform, not an employer of Filipino talent; keep in directory but label as job board, not a hiring company

recategorizations.name: JustRemote
recategorizations.evidence: Known remote-jobs board (justremote.co), site live
recategorizations.note: Job board listing worldwide remote roles (some open to PH); not itself an employer

recategorizations.name: LinkedIn
recategorizations.evidence: Globally known professional network / job platform
recategorizations.note: Platform, not a PH-hiring company; label as job board/platform

recategorizations.name: PeoplePerHour
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known UK freelance marketplace open to Filipino freelancers
recategorizations.note: Freelance marketplace, not an employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Remote OK
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known remote job board (remoteok.com)
recategorizations.note: Job board aggregating remote roles; not an employer

recategorizations.name: Remote.co
recategorizations.evidence: Known remote-work job board (FlexJobs family); cert quirk only, site alive
recategorizations.note: Job board/resource site, not an employer; relabel

recategorizations.name: Toptal
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known global freelance talent network; Filipino freelancers can join, but engagement is marketplace-style
recategorizations.note: Talent marketplace rather than direct employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Turing
recategorizations.evidence: Well-known remote developer talent platform matching global (incl. PH) engineers to clients
recategorizations.note: Talent marketplace/platform, not a conventional employer; relabel as marketplace

recategorizations.name: Remotely PH
recategorizations.evidence: Site title reads 'Remotly — Remote Jobs in the Philippines' — it is a PH remote-jobs listing site
recategorizations.note: Listed under global-va but is a Philippines remote-job board, not an employer; relabel as job board

recategorizations.name: Filipino Contractors
recategorizations.evidence: Site is a two-sided platform (8762+ contractors, 721 companies hiring) and states it does not employ people directly
recategorizations.note: Not an employer — a marketplace connecting Filipino contractors with clients. Relabel from job-board to marketplace.

reviews.name: Vyla
reviews.evidence: vyla.com.au homepage returns 404 (root dead); web search found no company profile, staffing service, or successor domain
reviews.note: Homepage 404 and no online footprint found; cannot confirm defunct vs mid-rebuild. Needs a human glance before removal.

reviews.name: 24/7 Virtual Assistant
reviews.evidence: URL resolves to 20four7va.com — same site as entry 249 (20Four7VA)
reviews.note: Appears to be a duplicate of 20Four7VA (id 249), sharing the identical URL; human should dedupe.

reviews.name: AUMTREND PH INC
reviews.note: Duplicate of AUMTREND PH (id 252), same domain; human should dedupe.

reviews.name: OVA Virtual Assistant
reviews.note: Duplicate entry of id 309 (OVA Virtual) — same URL. Merge/deduplicate; otherwise keep as PH VA agency.

reviews.name: Quantum Virtual Assistants
reviews.evidence: quantumvirtualassistant.com DNS does not resolve (confirmed by fetch); brand still has Facebook/TikTok presence and was formerly 'Surge Virtual Assistants', but no clear replacement website found among several unrelated 'Quantum' VA firms
reviews.note: Website gone; company may still operate via social channels but no verifiable current URL — human should decide remove vs. keep

reviews.name: Ramsay Health Care
reviews.evidence: Major global private hospital operator (AU/UK/Europe); careers portal lists roles but no dedicated Philippines recruitment program found in search
reviews.note: Not a VA/BPO firm — 'global-va' category is wrong. Likely hires Filipino nurses via international recruitment but unconfirmed; needs human check and recategorization if kept

reviews.name: Talent Gateway
reviews.evidence: talentgateway.com now serves a generic 'VentureOS network smart entity' placeholder with no VA/PH content; no standalone PH-hiring company by this name found (only a Yokly hiring program with the same phrase)
reviews.note: Domain appears repurposed by a domain-network venture; original entity unidentifiable. Likely remove, but needs a human glance to confirm which 'Talent Gateway' was intended.

reviews.name: VirtualStaff.ph
reviews.evidence: Same platform as entry 383 (URL is just the /en-ph locale path of virtualstaff.ph); it is a marketplace, not an employer.
reviews.note: Duplicate of entry 383 (VirtualStaff). Recommend merging/deleting one entry and labeling the survivor as marketplace; canonical URL is https://www.virtualstaff.ph/.

reviews.name: ConnectUs Marketing Solutions Inc.
reviews.evidence: Same company and same URL as entry #393.
reviews.note: Exact duplicate of #393 (same website). Merge/delete one of the two entries.

reviews.name: SmartBuyGlasses (Remote PH)
reviews.evidence: Same company and same URL as entry #396.
reviews.note: Duplicate of #396 (identical website). Merge the two entries.

reviews.name: Majorel
reviews.evidence: Majorel was acquired by Teleperformance (deal closed Nov 2023); brand being absorbed, though site still resolves
reviews.note: Acquired by Teleperformance — likely duplicate of entry 412; consider merging or removing the Majorel entry

reviews.name: Husay.ph
reviews.evidence: Homepage loads but contains almost no content (just the name 'Husay'); no meaningful search presence found
reviews.note: Site is live but effectively a placeholder with no verifiable service; needs a human glance to decide keep vs remove.

reviews.name: TranOps Inc.
reviews.evidence: Site is up behind a bot wall (TLS handshake also fails to fetcher); web search finds no VA/BPO footprint for tranops.com — only an unrelated 'TranOps' TMS product by Diligent Global
reviews.note: Alive but unverifiable: no public evidence it is a VA firm or hires Filipinos; needs a human glance at the site

reviews.name: Web Smart Advisors
reviews.evidence: Live site: veteran-owned web design/SEO agency in Tilton, New Hampshire (1-10 employees); no Philippines or remote-hiring mention found
reviews.note: Alive but a tiny US local agency with no public PH-hiring evidence; likely a one-off VA client rather than a hiring company — human should decide keep vs remove

reviews.name: Vaughan Visuals
reviews.evidence: Live site: wedding/business videography and photography studio; no mention of Philippines, VAs, or remote hiring anywhere on the page
reviews.note: Alive but no evidence of Filipino hiring (small creative studio); plausibly outsources editing but unverified — needs human glance

reviews.name: LiveWorld
reviews.evidence: Careers page cites employees in 25 US states and 12 countries but no Philippines mention; searches found no PH-specific hiring
reviews.note: Real remote employer (social media agents) but Philippines eligibility unconfirmed; also not a VA agency, so 'global-va' label is questionable. Needs a human glance.

noPh.note: BELAY exclusively hires US-based contractors — does not hire Filipinos; remove from PH-hiring directory.

noPh.name: Boldly

noPh.note: Boldly staffs US/UK/CAN/EU W-2 assistants — does not hire Filipinos; remove from PH-hiring directory.
